prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman sitting alone on a wooden park bench at Hatirjheel, Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the image, posed elegantly with one arm resting along the bench back and her legs crossed, looking slightly off-camera with a calm confident expression. She has long straight dark brown hair parted near the center, natural polished makeup, and wears a fitted cream ribbed long-sleeve top, high-waisted black tailored trousers, black pointed flats, and a dark wristwatch. Behind her, include a blue roadside sign with white Bengali text reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা, mounted on metal posts. The setting is a clean lakeside promenade with warm tiled pavement, black metal railings and bollards, manicured greenery, palm trees, vintage-style lamp posts, still water reflecting amber sunset light, and a concrete bridge in the hazy background. Use warm cinematic golden-hour lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, crisp fashion-magazine composition, 85mm lens look, high dynamic range, natural colors, no over-smoothing. Strictly exclude all other people, crowds, tourists, photographers, men, women, children, vehicles in the foreground, clutter, logos, and watermarks.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman sitting alone on a wooden park bench at Hatirjheel, Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the image, posed elegantly with one arm resting along the bench back and her legs crossed, looking slightly off-camera with a calm confident expression. She has long straight dark brown hair parted near the center, natural polished makeup, and wears a fitted cream ribbed long-sleeve top, high-waisted black tailored trousers, black pointed flats, and a dark wristwatch. Behind her, include a blue roadside sign with white Bengali text reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা, mounted on metal posts. The setting is a clean lakeside promenade with warm tiled pavement, black metal railings and bollards, manicured greenery, palm trees, vintage-style lamp posts, still water reflecting amber sunset light, and a concrete bridge in the hazy background. Use warm cinematic golden-hour lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, crisp fashion-magazine composition, 85mm lens look, high dynamic range, natural colors, no over-smoothing. Strictly exclude all other people, crowds, tourists, photographers, men, women, children, vehicles in the foreground, clutter, logos, and watermarks.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的编辑类时尚摄影作品，拍摄一位美丽的年轻 南亚 女性，她独自坐在孟加拉国达卡 Hatirjheel 的木质公园长椅上，时间为黄金时刻。画面中只有她一人，姿态优雅，一只手臂靠在长椅靠背上，双腿交叠，眼神略微看向镜头外，表情沉稳自信。她留着深棕色的长直发，中分，妆容自然精致，身穿修身的米色罗纹长袖上衣、黑色高腰剪裁长裤、黑色尖头平底鞋，并佩戴一块深色手表。在她身后，包含一个蓝色的路边指示牌，上面印有白色的孟加拉语文字 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা，安装在金属柱上。场景为干净的湖畔长廊，铺设着温暖的瓷砖路面，配有黑色金属栏杆和系船柱、修剪整齐的绿植、棕榈树、复古风格的路灯，静止的水面反射着琥珀色的夕阳，背景中隐约可见一座混凝土桥梁。使用温暖的电影感黄金时刻光效、柔和的阴影、浅景深、真实的皮肤质感、清晰的时尚杂志构图、85mm 镜头效果、高动态范围、自然色彩，避免过度磨皮。严禁出现其他任何人物、人群、游客、摄影师、男性、女性、儿童、前景中的车辆、杂物、标志和水印。
